title: Floral Fluffy Egyptian Chickpeas Tagine
description: A fragrant onepot Egyptian chickpea tagine bursting with floral rosepetal hints, fluffy textures, and a proteinrich blend of spices.

ingredients.name: red bell pepper, seeded and diced

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a heavy‑bottomed pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook for another 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour in the drained chickpeas and sprinkle the cumin, coriander, paprika, and cayenne; stir well to coat the chickpeas with the spices.
Add the water and lemon juice, bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Reduce the heat, cover, and let it cook for 20 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld and the sauce to thicken slightly.
Remove the lid, fold in the chopped parsley, and stir to combine.
Taste the tagine, seasoning with salt and freshly ground black pepper as needed.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with a few extra parsley leaves if desired.
